message:
test(pipeline): add 26 CI-runnable semantic pipeline tests (bd-3qov)

Add three new non-ignored test modules to semantic_pipeline_e2e.rs that
exercise the full search pipeline using the hash embedder (no model
downloads required):

hash_embedder_pipeline (14 tests): normalized vectors, determinism,
different texts produce different embeddings, batch==individual,
vector index add/search, type filtering, top-k limiting, empty index,
type counts, self-similarity, self-retrieval, empty string rejection,
full pipeline roundtrip (embed->index->search->verify).

utility_functions (9 tests): cosine similarity for identical,
orthogonal, opposite, empty, mismatched vectors; is_normalized for
unit and non-unit vectors; vector_norm correctness and edge cases.

model_registry_hash (3 tests): hash embedder creation via registry,
model aliases (hash/fnv1a/hash-fnv1a-384), embedder info fields.

Previously all 12 tests were #[ignore]-gated (require model files).
Now: 26 CI-runnable + 12 model-gated = 38 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
